docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DJIU INDV., SLIMANE DBA CREPES A GO GO INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DJIU INDV., SLIMANE DBA CREPES A GO GO INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,341.29 AS TO DEFENDANT DJIU INDV., SLIMANE DBA CREPES A GO GO INC.
